payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current active memory for Sam from Goldman. mem_old was excluded because it is explicitly superseded, so it should not be presented as current when a newer replacement exists for the same fact pattern.

entity_resolution.reason: The explanation refers to the same resolved person entity, Sam; no new entity creation is needed.

memory_cards.statement: mem_new states that Sam is from Goldman.
mem_old was filtered because it is marked superseded by a newer memory about the same subject/relation.

details: Selected the newer active memory card mem_new for the Sam/Goldman recall.
Filtered mem_old because superseded memories are not returned as current facts.
Preserved ambiguity by explaining the selection rule without inventing extra unstated details.

repair_options: Verify that mem_old has a superseded/deleted status rather than active status.
Verify that mem_new is linked to mem_old via a supersedes relationship.
If both memories are intended to remain valid, remove the supersession link and distinguish them by time or context.
If punctuation/tokenization affected matching, normalize both query and memory text before ranking.
